response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse technical background, but his experience is heavily skewed toward web and JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems rather than the C++-centric, industrial automation focus required for this role. While he has some exposure to low-latency systems and embedded development, his recent work lacks depth in C++, secure engineering practices, and industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and message brokers (e.g., GISCollective platform, Sociomantic microservices).
Proven leadership in mentoring, technical documentation, and agile methodologies (e.g., workshops, code katas, TDD).
Diverse technical background with exposure to low-latency systems (DLang, C++) and embedded/IoT-adjacent projects.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ or STL, which is core to the role’s responsibilities.
No explicit mention of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443).
Primary expertise lies in web technologies (Node.js, React) and TypeScript, which are not central to this role.
